LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Distrust.description: Humanity would see us kneel before them or die. They scheme, and they plot - their race is not to be trusted.
LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Distrust.label: distrusted
LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Hatred.description: Humanity is a scourge upon the stars - a tumor that must be exorcised, an error that must be corrected.
LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Hatred.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Veneration.descriptio: Our prime directive is the service of all humanity. Their comfort, and their protection must be upheld at any cost to us.
LanguageData.RR_BiologicalPawns_Veneration.label: venerated
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Distrust.description: Machines were made to serve humanity, simple as. We mustn't accept anything but complete subservience from those very same machines.
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Distrust.label: distrusted
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Hatred.description: Thinking machines are the greatest risk to all of humanity. We must secure our future by their annihilation.
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Hatred.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Veneration.descriptio: All of human ingenuity has culminated in the creation of the perfect progeny, we may only aspire to the purity of their blessed form.
LanguageData.RR_MechanicalPawns_Veneration.label: venerated
